description_long: This object is a decorative candle holder featuring a whimsical, undulating base finished in a glossy purple color. The base supports five upright white candles, each with a visible flame at the top, suggesting they are currently lit. The central candle is positioned higher than the others, creating a dynamic, wave-like silhouette. The candles are evenly spaced along the curving base, which appears to be made of a solid, possibly ceramic or metal material coated in a smooth, shiny finish. The flames are stylized and bright yellow, with small black wicks visible at their centers. This piece is both functional and ornamental, likely intended as a centerpiece or accent for festive or urban public settings.
description: A glossy purple, wavy candle holder supports five lit white candles, with the central candle elevated above the rest. The design is playful and modern, making it a striking decorative accent.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full undulating purple base and all five lit candles, with the central candle standing tallest.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the narrow profile of the holder, with the candles aligned in a single row and the base's thickness visible.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the wavy base and five candles, with the central candle again most prominent.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the slim profile and vertical alignment of the candles.
